severityLevels.label: low-risk
severityLevels.description: Cosmetic or low-impact issue. Auto-fix allowed if reversible and verification passes.

severityLevels.label: medium-risk
severityLevels.description: Experience risk. Recommend-and-wait by default; only constrained mitigation allowed.

severityLevels.label: high-risk
severityLevels.description: Business/trust risk. Approval required before fix execution.

severityLevels.label: critical
severityLevels.description: Critical incident. Immediate safe-mode and human authorization required for major changes.
